0 / 7

Track 1 // Medal Run

Collect 7 medals to win

  • Steer with A/D or ←/→
  • Accelerate and brake with W/S or ↑/↓
  • One Type 7 medal spawns somewhere on the circuit each lap
  • Press R at any time to restart the run

Victory

7 medals collected

You completed the Type 7 medal run.

TYPE 7 // ROAD LAB

Reference baseline with semantic corner authoring


        

      


      

        

          
Controls

          
        

        

          
Steer: A/D or ←/→

          
Throttle / Brake: W/S or ↑/↓

          
Jump to section: 1 2 3 4 5

          
Pause / Step: P / .

          
Reset: R
